parameters.query:
INSERT INTO qc_checks (project_id, phase_key, generated_by, items, notes)
VALUES ($1::uuid, $2, $3, $4::jsonb, $5)
ON CONFLICT (project_id, phase_key, template_version) DO UPDATE
  SET items = EXCLUDED.items, generated_at = now(), generated_by = EXCLUDED.generated_by,
      notes = COALESCE(qc_checks.notes || E'\n', '') || COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.notes, ''), ''),
      status = 'open'
RETURNING id, project_id, phase_key, status, jsonb_array_length(items) AS items_count;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({status:'created', qc_id: $json.id, project_id: $json.project_id, phase_key: $json.phase_key, items_count: $json.items_count, checklist_status: $json.status}) }}
